zh.lifeSummary: 當Guinodeon de Vannes於0980年出生在法國布列塔尼莫比韓瓦斯時，她的父親Bishop Orscand de Vannes II50歲，母親Guénedon DE VANNES41歲。她和Benedict Budic VIII至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1043年在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉享年63歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vannes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Nels, Thor.

variants.name: Sandness
meanings: Norwegian: old variant of Sandnes (and, in North America, probably also an altered form of this), a habitational name from any of fifty or more farmsteads all over Norway named with Old Norse Sandnes, a compound of sand ‘sand, sandy plain’, ‘beach’ + nes ‘headland, promontory’.

en.lifeSummary: When Guinodeon de Vannes was born in 0980, in Vannes, Morbihan, Brittany, France, her father, Bishop Orscand de Vannes II, was 50 and her mother, Guénedon DE VANNES, was 41. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Benedict Budic VIII. She died in 1043, in Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guinodeon de Vannes est née en 0980, à Vannes, Morbihan, Bretagne, France, son père, Bishop Orscand de Vannes II, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Guénedon DE VANNES, avait 41 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Benedict Budic VIII. Elle est décédée en 1043, à Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guinodeon de Vannes 0980 in Vannes, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bishop Orscand de Vannes II 50 und ihre Mutter Guénedon DE VANNES 41. Sie hatte mit Benedict Budic VIII mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1043 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guinodeon de Vannes è nata il nel 0980 nel Vannes, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Bishop Orscand de Vannes II, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Guénedon DE VANNES, aveva 41 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Benedict Budic VIII. Morì nel 1043, nel Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guinodeon de Vannesが0980年にフランスブレタグンモービハンヴァンスで生まれた時，父Bishop Orscand de Vannes IIは50歳，母Guénedon DE VANNESは41歳であった。彼女はBenedict Budic VIIIとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1043年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guinodeon de Vannes(이)가 0980년 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 버네스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bishop Orscand de Vannes II(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Guénedon DE VANNES(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 Benedict Budic VIII(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1043년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guinodeon de Vannes nasceu em 0980, em Vannes, Morbihan, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Bishop Orscand de Vannes II, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Guénedon DE VANNES, tinha 41 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Benedict Budic VIII. Ela faleceu em 1043, em Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guinodeon de Vannes родилась в 0980 г. в местности ваннесь, морбихань, бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Bishop Orscand de Vannes II было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Guénedon DE VANNES, 41. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Benedict Budic VIII. Она умерла в 1043 г. в местности илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 63 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Benedict Budic VIII. Murió en 1043, en Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 63 años.
